headline: Aurora lands McLane deal to run driverless truck routes in Texas
summary: Aurora said it plans to expand to new routes between McLane distribution centers across the U.S. Sun Belt by the end of 2026.

raw.headline: Aurora lands McLane deal to run driverless truck routes in Texas
raw.summary: Aurora said it plans to expand to new routes between McLane distribution centers across the U.S. Sun Belt by the end of 2026.

headline: Berkshire-owned distribution giant to deploy driverless big rigs across U.S. Sun Belt
summary: Berkshire Hathaway-owned McLane, one of America's biggest distribution companies, is deploying self-driving big rigs with Aurora for its restaurants business.

raw.headline: Berkshire-owned distribution giant to deploy driverless big rigs across U.S. Sun Belt
raw.summary: Berkshire Hathaway-owned McLane, one of America's biggest distribution companies, is deploying self-driving big rigs with Aurora for its restaurants business.
